options.name: Tanzanite One
options.description: Entry Level Care-coordinated Network Option which provides In-Hospital benefits within a defined hospital network subject to an annual hospital limit. Out-of-Hospital benefits subject to GEMS Network and FP nomination and Specialist rules.

options.name: Beryl
options.description: Entry Level Network Option that provides In-Hospital benefits subject to an annual hospital limit. Out-of-Hospital benefits subject to GEMS network.

options.name: Ruby
options.description: Mid-Level Savings Option which offers members Comprehensive In-Hospital benefits. Out-of-Hospital benefits subject to a Savings account and Block Benefit.

options.name: Emerald Value
options.description: High Level Care-coordinated Network Option which provides Comprehensive In-Hospital benefits within a defined hospital network. Comprehensive Out-of-Hospital benefits subject to GEMS network, FP nomination. Day-to-day Block Benefit.

options.name: Emerald
options.description: High Level Benefit Option which provides Comprehensive In-Hospital benefits and Comprehensive Out-of-Hospital benefits subject to Day-to-day Block Benefit and Primary Care Extender Benefit.

options.name: Onyx
options.description: Top Level Benefit Option which provides Comprehensive In-Hospital benefits and Comprehensive Out-of-Hospital benefits subject to a high value Day-to-day Block Benefit.
